summary: Exhaustive search for a Garrido-defensible decision contract exposing material, observable, resource-adjusted adaptive headroom (H_obs) under canonical order-level ReT. Outcome: NO positive instance. A material perfect-information ceiling exists in exactly one disclosed researcher extension (Program O, H_PI 0.152) but does NOT convert out-of-sample. The thesis-native envelope is negative across 4 decision surfaces, 3 independent programs, 2 physics generations, and now Garrido's own risk-escalation table. Every remaining reopener is an exact, falsifiable domain question listed below.

primary_endpoint.note: Time-resolved/temporal resilience indices are secondary sensitivities only; a temporal-only gain authorizes neither learner nor Paper 2.

full_des_max_H_PI.H_obs: ~0 (Program E: 0/10 PPO seeds, tree, heuristic, convex mixture all fail)

stylized_voi_atlas_64_cells.STATUS: RETRACTED_BY_CORRECTIVE_AUDIT — the 2 positive-H_obs cells were shed-to-win (theatre starvation, fails worst-CSSU fairness). EXCLUDED FROM INFERENCE.
stylized_voi_atlas_64_cells.interpretation: Directional only: observable policy destroys value despite clairvoyant headroom.

track_c_campaign_oracle.regime: campaign_v1 non-stationary over R22/R23/R24(+R21), Garrido Ch7-motivated
track_c_campaign_oracle.verdict: NULL — constants structurally near-optimal even under engineered non-stationarity with priced costs
track_c_campaign_oracle.key_finding: HYSTERESIS BEATS CLAIRVOYANCE: non-privileged EWMA detector outperforms the true-state instant switcher x2.3 under commitment lags

l_e_minus_1_program.finding: optimal weekly shift = S1 in 100% of branched states (I168-I1344); zero within-tape switching value; clairvoyant constant bound +1.6-3.6%
l_e_minus_1_program.note: Third independent program to measure constants-optimal in this DES class

route_recourse_program_L_R03.full_des_H_PI: <=0.005 at every R22 regime swept (thesis-native 24h -> 720h extreme)
route_recourse_program_L_R03.verdict: STOP — buffer-intercept: downstream SB/CSSU buffers absorb Op8 outages
route_recourse_program_L_R03.note: Stylized screen showed 0.15; full-DES collapsed ~30x. Stylized screens over-state headroom.

garrido_risk_escalation_screen.design: Garrido's OWN escalation table: Cf1-Cf20 exact + one-at-a-time R11-R24 + impacts 1x/1.5x/2x; R3 (black swan) FROZEN and excluded; 45 profiles x 18 constant postures x 6 seeds = 4860 ten-year evaluations
garrido_risk_escalation_screen.decisive_finding: The optimal constant posture is INVARIANT across all 45 risk profiles at every budget cap. Escalating the thesis's own recurrent risks does not change what you should do. Risks reduce physical resilience (ReT 0.53 -> 0.20 under escalation) but create ZERO regime-tailoring headroom.
garrido_risk_escalation_screen.scope: development (6 seeds) — a cheap door that did not open; requires no confirmation to stay closed (burden was to demonstrate headroom; absent by 2 orders of magnitude)
garrido_risk_escalation_screen.RETRACTION_2026-07-15: A prior revision of this certificate asserted the screen was a pure one-factor-at-a-time (OAT) 'hypercross' and that the negative held ONLY ALONG THE AXES. THAT ASSERTION IS FALSE AND IS RETRACTED. Verified against supply_chain/thesis_design.py RISK_PATTERNS: the Cf profiles are boolean tuples over (R11,R12,R13,R14)/(R21,R22,R23,R24) and DO vary factors concomitantly -- e.g. Cf1=(F,F,T,T) raises R13+R14 together; Cf6=(T,T,F,T) raises R11+R12+R14 together; Cf20=(T,T,T,T) raises ALL FOUR R2 risks simultaneously. Cf20 is itself a combined wartime-like regime and it produced no door. The error was inferred from the contract label 'one_at_a_time' without reading thesis_design.py.
garrido_risk_escalation_screen.scope_ACCURATE: The screen covered a DISCRETE subset of intra-R1 and intra-R2 concomitant combinations (the Cf1-Cf20 boolean patterns, including the all-four-R2 cell Cf20), PLUS one-at-a-time sensitivities and 1x/1.5x/2x impacts. It did NOT cover: the continuous risk space, inter-family (R1 x R2) interactions, phi x psi coupling, or temporal/coupling structure. The negative is established over that discrete design, not merely 'along the axes'.
garrido_risk_escalation_screen.unexplored_regions: continuous space; inter-family R1xR2 interactions; phi x psi coupling; temporal coupling structures

extended_envelope_program_O_two_nonfungi.verdict: CLOSED — material H_PI established, but H_obs NOT confirmed out-of-sample

full_des_H_PI.throughput: conserved (delta gross_production = 0; all charged/reserved resources equal)
full_des_H_PI.significance: THE ONLY material perfect-information ceiling found in the entire search; survives real Op9-Op12 buffering (the test that collapsed route recourse to <=0.005); causally attributable to non-fungibility (fungible null = 0 exactly)

label_only_hmm.evidence: oracle-true (rho,share) per cell changed 0/192 trajectories; action is sign(belief-0.5) and predicted_share-0.5=(2*share-1)(belief-0.5) is share-magnitude-invariant => auto-calibration cannot help; failure is decisional-structure not parametric

state_rich_classical.note: all 10 controllers out-transported the full 65,536-calendar frontier; information placebos never executed (gated behind the resource gate)

dual_resource_diagnostic.finding: under fixed-clock reserved capacity, belief-MPC beats ALL information placebos over 3 connected cells; incremental operational-state value POSITIVE and material (LCB95 +0.025..+0.073). Under pay-per-use: fails.
dual_resource_diagnostic.scope: post-hoc development diagnostic on burned tapes

fixed_clock_physical_oos_validation.decisive_failure: rho90_share90 favorable on 26/48 tapes vs preregistered minimum 34 (mean +0.083 but BIMODAL/unstable); other cells 45/48 and 44/48
fixed_clock_physical_oos_validation.bug_disclosure: a real executor defect mixed 69 incompatible-scale estimands into a single simultaneous critical (23.65M), voiding the LCB/placebo/guardrail flags. The verdict is INDEPENDENT of the bug: the 26/48 favorable-tape count is a raw per-tape count computed pre-bootstrap.
fixed_clock_physical_oos_validation.no_rescue: closed without changing controller, cells, physics, metric, or thresholds

conversion_ratio_eta.program_O: H_PI 0.152 material; H_obs not confirmed OOS => eta not established
conversion_ratio_eta.interpretation: Across the entire search, no decision contract converts perfect-information headroom into deployable, resource-honest, out-of-sample-stable observable value.

reopeners.question: Does an unfilled ration requirement have a HARD deadline after which it is PERMANENTLY abandoned (not backordered), with a deadline distribution TIGHTER than the 24-120h R21/R23/R22 recovery timescales, AND does the logistics agency hold doctrinal triage/admission authority?
reopeners.reopens_if: hard deadlines tighter than recovery times AND triage authority both exist
reopeners.closes_if: orders always backorder, or deadlines looser than recovery, or no triage authority (collapses to D1)

reopeners.question: Is there ONE real named resource (team/vehicle/crew/skill pool) allocated MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVELY among (a) plant/assembly recovery, (b) LOC repair, and (c) theatre response, such that committing it to one precludes the others for a real activation + dwell time? And does the Maintenance Battalion have FEWER cross-trained recovery teams than disabled sites (forcing serialization) after R21/R3?
reopeners.reopens_if: a genuinely scarce, mutually-exclusive shared resource with nonzero travel/repair time and non-privileged damage assessment before commitment
reopeners.closes_if: budgets are separate/parallel, or teams >= disabled sites

reopeners.question: Do >=2 mutually NON-SUBSTITUTABLE ration classes exist among the 21 real types (religious/medical/climate) that SHARE the capacity-constrained Op5-Op7 assembly, with an uncertain, persistent, partially-advance-observable demand mix? Real (share, persistence, setup, cadence)?
reopeners.validates_if: non-substitutable classes share the bottleneck with uncertain persistent advance-observable mix => the certified H_PI 0.152 becomes MFSC-representative
reopeners.collapses_if: all types mutually substitutable, or dedicated non-contending capacity, or deterministic mix => exact fungible null (H_PI = 0)
reopeners.status: OPEN — but note Program O's H_obs already failed OOS, so a 'validates' answer restores representativeness of the CEILING only, not a positive

reopeners.question: Is the downstream Op10/Op12 fleet FIXED-CLOCK RESERVED (scheduled convoys depart and consume vehicle/crew-hours whether loaded or empty, so filling idle capacity is free) or PAY-PER-USE (each loaded trip consumes marginal resource)?
reopeners.scopes: Program O's fixed-clock branch: under fixed-clock the dual-resource diagnostic's development signal is resource-honest; under pay-per-use it is a resource confound.
reopeners.status: OPEN — but NOT decisive: the fixed-clock OOS validation already FAILED on prospective consistency (26/48), so Q14 cannot rescue Program O; it only scopes the retired development finding.

reopeners.question: Does the operator choose among >=2 routes toward the same downstream demand with one finite shared fleet, with degradation persistence and pre-dispatch warning?
reopeners.status: BAR RAISED — route recourse already has a full-DES negative (H_PI <= 0.005, buffer-intercept). A reopener would additionally require finite downstream storage.

residual_untested_threads.description: Endogenous/impulse control of WHEN to intervene (sub-weekly), attacking Track C's fixed-168h-cadence + commitment-lag root cause.
residual_untested_threads.status: UN-LICENSED — the frozen rule gated it behind the risk-sensitivity door, which did not open (R2_frequency @ cap 0.5 gave 5.0e-05 vs 0.01).
residual_untested_threads.assessment: Motivation substantially undercut: the risk screen shows the optimal constant posture is INVARIANT across all 45 risk profiles, so better-timed switching between postures has nothing to exploit at the regime level. NOT strictly refuted for within-event response timing. Would require a new preregistration with independent motivation.
residual_untested_threads.prior_evidence_against: Track C: hysteresis beats clairvoyance x2.3 under commitment lags — even perfect information cannot be converted at the weekly epoch.

residual_untested_threads.description: Continuous / inter-family (R1xR2) / phi-psi-coupled / temporally-coupled risk structure -- the regions the DISCRETE Cf design did not cover. NOT 'the interaction interior' at large: intra-family concomitant combinations WERE covered (incl. Cf20 = all four R2 risks).
residual_untested_threads.status: OPEN but DOWNGRADED. Superseded in governance by the frozen war_stress_timing_atlas_v1 (144 concomitant cells, connected-region rule, seeds 747xxxx). Any GSA layer must sit ON TOP of that atlas, target H_timing_safe (not constant-posture tailoring), and handle DES stochasticity.
residual_untested_threads.method: Morris screening + Sobol total-effect (S_Ti - S_i = interaction mass) + PRIM scenario discovery on DEVELOPMENT tapes (hypothesis-generating only), then a frozen one-shot confirmation on a VIRGIN 746-series block. NOT a grid search.
residual_untested_threads.prior: Evidence against is now stronger than previously stated: Cf20 already elevates all four R2 risks concomitantly and produced no door; Track C tested a combined campaign regime -> 6.5e-05 vs a 5% bar; extremes enter binary collapse; posture reorders with BUDGET, never with regime.

claim_boundary.H_PI_established_where: Program O only (0.15151, LCB95 0.11562, disclosed two-non-fungible-product researcher extension)

terminal_finding: Across the thesis-native envelope (4 decision surfaces, 3 independent programs, 2 physics generations, Garrido's own Cf1-Cf20 risk-escalation table) and one engineered extension with ~7x more clairvoyant headroom, NO decision contract converts perfect-information headroom into deployable, resource-honest, out-of-sample-stable observable value. The mechanism is consistent and mechanistically identified: the thesis DES is structurally over-buffered (constants are near-optimal; the optimal posture is invariant to risk regime), commitment lags defeat clairvoyance (hysteresis > true-state switching), and where clairvoyant headroom exists it does not survive observability, resource-honesty, or out-of-sample prospective consistency. Adaptive/learned control is NOT warranted in this system under the stated gates. Zero PPO seeds were wasted: every gate killed its candidate before training. SCOPE NOTE (corrected): the thesis-native risk evidence spans a DISCRETE design -- Cf1-Cf20 boolean patterns (including Cf20, which elevates all four R2 risks concomitantly) plus one-at-a-time sensitivities and 1x/1.5x/2x impacts. It does NOT span the continuous space, inter-family R1xR2 interactions, phi-psi coupling, or temporal coupling. An earlier revision wrongly characterised this as pure OAT; that claim is retracted.
